question: Show different nationalities of customers, along with the number of customers of each nationality.
sql: SELECT Nationality, COUNT(Customer_ID) FROM customer GROUP BY Nationality;

back_translation.intent: 统计每个国籍的客户数量

semantic.reason: 语义一致，原始问题要求展示不同国籍的客户及其数量，SQL反向翻译描述准确表达了这一意图，包括目标表、列、聚合函数和分组条件。
